title: astragalus varus
intro: Astragalus varus, also known as variegated milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory properties, which help the body to adapt to stress and regulate the immune system. The medicinal properties of Astragalus varus include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-viral effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as reduced fatigue, improved respiratory function, and enhanced immune response. Astragalus varus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
